data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for birthday/anniversary automatic discounts.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Birthday/anniversary automatic discounts' but did not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this functionality. The evidence does not include any details or endpoints that demonstrate the implementation of automatic discounts based on birthdays or anniversaries, leading to an inconclusive status. Without specific evidence to support the existence or functionality of this requirement, it cannot be validated.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or enforcement of birthday/anniversary automatic discounts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of birthday/anniversary automatic discounts.
